summary: Implemented task-024 (layer taxonomy) and task-026 (intent-based flow templates) in parallel. task-026: Extended FlowType to add 'exploration' and 'assessment'. Added EXPLORATION_FLOW (5 phases: frame/research/hypothesize/validate/document) and ASSESSMENT_FLOW (4 phases: inventory/measure/analyze/report) to flow-templates.ts. ReadinessGate.assess() now accepts optional flowType param — runChecksForFlow() applies per-flow applicability matrix (exploration/assessment skip 4 inapplicable checks, get flow-specific checks instead). Added checkExplorationQuestionClear and checkAssessmentScopeDefined checks. StrategySelector extended to route exploration/assessment to D0. readiness.ts wired: toFlowType() maps taskIntent to FlowType, toStrategyIntent() maps to strategy intent. LaunchForm dropdown gets 2 new options. task-024: Added inferLayer() to projects.ts (explicit field > CRUCIBLE 001-015 = pipeline > investigation = meta-project > documentation = pipeline > default = project). ProjectTask.layer field returned from API. Projects.tsx: LayerBadge component (gray/blue/green per layer), layer filter toggle row (default: meta-project+project visible), layer column in All Tasks table. 228/228 tests, clean typecheck.

Parallel investigation of 5 meta-UX tasks (024-028). Ran 5 concurrent Explore subagents reading codebase, flow skills, question schemas, ReadinessGate, LaunchForm, Projects, Dashboard. Synthesized findings into 5 proposal specs in specs/. task-024: Task Taxonomy — layer model (pipeline/meta-project/project), filtered views with layer badges, deferred question-tab split to task-025. task-025: Agent Question Flow — two contexts (pre-flight enrichment + runtime escalation), escalate() API, GraphExecutor pause/resume, notification surface, phased rollout. task-026: Intent-Based Flow Templates — exploration and assessment flows defined (phases, entry questions, ReadinessGate applicability matrix), flow-aware gate checks, LaunchForm intent selector. task-027: Ambiguity Resolution — recommends Option C hybrid (pre-flight for structural/terminological, runtime escape hatch for decision/technical/emergent), escalation quota, feedback loop mines runtime questions into pre-flight checks. task-028: Meta-Project Orchestration — 3-step intake→enrich→shape pattern, planning mode in LaunchForm, structured brief, run↔task linkage via taskId, planning agent as opt-in 'Help me scope this', new CRUD endpoints for tasks.jsonl.

Adaptive Pipeline Phases 0-2: graph data model (types/graph.ts, GraphStore, GraphBuilder, JSON schema), readiness gate (6 global rules, question generator, preflight), decomposition engine (D0/D4/D5 strategies, ComplexityEstimator, CouplingAudit, AdaptiveBounds), extended variant YAML loading. 43/43 tests passing. No existing types or RunEngine modified.

Token metrics tab: Added GET /api/sessions/metrics endpoint that parses Claude Code transcript JSONL files from ~/.claude/projects/, deduplicates assistant turns by requestId, computes per-session token aggregates (input, output, cache read, cache creation, peak context %). Added Metrics tab to Session.tsx with summary stats, current session card (highlighted), and collapsible recent sessions list. Each session card shows 4 token bars + context gauge. Also added GET /api/sessions/projects for listing available project slugs. Full QA pass: 0 console errors, 0 failed API requests. 139/139 tests passing. Also QA'd the 'start crucible process on existing task' flow end-to-end (Projects → Run → LaunchForm pre-fill → all APIs 200).

Pre-built Docker image strategy Phase 1: research (devcontainers, E2B, buildpacks, Nixpacks, Replit Nix, Gitpod, Heroku), spec (specs/pre-built-images-spec.md), implementation (3-tier runtime detection, 6 ecosystem Dockerfiles, multi-image DockerRunner.ensureImage()), 20 new tests (159 total), smoke-tested base+python images (624ms startup, network lockdown verified).
Docker CLI run f14bacc8-ebc8-4558-96e1-1e033e3409ef: completed, 0 tokens, $0.0000, 3040ms
Docker CLI run d543b432-9afc-4797-842b-978fb8f2bbad: completed, 0 tokens, $0.0000, 3307ms
Docker CLI run ca54a702-f249-4e76-ad35-b9438b1a6f04: completed, 1011 tokens, $0.0451, 23326ms

Phase 7A Readiness Gate UX: 3-tier binding (required/waivable/advisory), POST /api/readiness endpoint with enrichment merging, ReadinessGatePanel component (tier badges, inline inputs, extension slot for 7B), LaunchForm progressive disclosure (essential/readiness/advanced sections), Strategy + Task Intent dropdowns, dual launch buttons (gated primary + 'Launch anyway' bypass), gate metadata stored in run JSON. 198/198 backend tests pass. UI build clean.

QA of Phase 7A Readiness Gate UX end-to-end. Flow: Projects → expand CRUCIBLE → task-023 'Run →' → LaunchForm with progressive disclosure (Description, Instructions pre-filled, Agent=claude-cli, Strategy=D0, Task Intent=Implementation, Advanced collapsed). ReadinessGatePanel rendered 6 checks: 5/6 passed (Acceptance Criteria, Scope Boundary, Dependencies, Ambiguous Terms, Risk Classification all green; Verification Command failed with inline input). Primary button showed 'Resolve 1 check(s)' (disabled). 'Launch anyway' bypass clicked. Run 9269f357 completed in 16.5s, 598 tokens. Agent found NavBar, added TEST tab to NAV_ITEMS. Gate metadata (gateBypass, gateSummary) stored in run JSON.

Phase 8A spec: Artifact Apply — Diff-First, Apply-on-Demand. Spec covers diff generation at teardown (scoped via writtenFiles), GET/POST /api/runs/:id/diff and /apply endpoints, DiffSummary+DiffViewer+ApplyButton UI components on RunDetail page, applied badge on Dashboard. Three apply modes: working-tree, branch, commit. DB migration: applied_at, applied_mode columns. Written to specs/phase-8a-artifact-apply-spec.md. Plan at .claude/plans/phase-8a-artifact-apply.md.

Phase 7B: Deep Analysis & Strategy Suggestion — implemented full spec. Backend: StrategySelector.ts pure decision tree (6 cascade paths, 20 unit tests), ReadinessGate.assessDeep() batched LLM call for 4 heuristics, POST /api/readiness extended with deep=true+taskIntent. Frontend: DeepAnalysisPanel.tsx (opt-in button, spinner, compact colored-dot results), strategy suggestion badge with manual override tracking, clear-on-edit via key reset, deep analysis metadata in run submission. Tests: 218 total (198 existing + 20 new), 0 failures. QA: launched task-023 via CRUCIBLE UI (run f1baafaf, claude-cli, 595 tokens, 17.7s). Created tasks/add-test-tab.json task file.

Phase 8A: Artifact Apply — Diff-First, Apply-on-Demand. Backend: initSeedRepo() git-inits workdir at seed time (CLI + Docker paths), generateRunDiff() captures git diff HEAD after run completion. Docker path uses captureGitDiff() via docker exec before container destroy. E2B path skipped (no git in sandbox). API: GET /api/runs/:id/diff returns patch+stats, POST /api/runs/:id/apply does git apply with 3 modes (working-tree, branch, commit) + path traversal protection. DB: auto-migration adds applied_at/applied_mode columns. Frontend: DiffSummary (file list + stats), DiffViewer (expandable green/red diff), ApplyButton (mode dropdown), Changes section on RunDetail between Result and Events, applied badge on Dashboard + RunDetail header. Tests: 228 total (218 existing + 10 new diff tests), 0 failures. Build clean. Simplified from file-by-file comparison to git-based approach per operator feedback.
